metadata.title: SYNGO_BP_2116
metadata.comment:
Rationale: figure 6; CPG2 Knockdown Disrupts Constitutive Glutamate Receptor Internalization

figure 7; CPG2 Knockdown Disrupts Activity-Induced Internalization of AMPA Receptors. Experimental description: "Embryonic medium-density hippocampal cultures were made as described (Brewer et al., 1993)". This reference paper uses rats, and the cortical cultures were also made from rat;

"For postnatal high-density cortical cultures, cortices from P1 rats were plated onto poly-D-lysine and laminin-coated 6 cm dishes at 1.5 × 106 cells per dish in Neurobasal A medium (Invitrogen), supplemented with 0.5 mM L-glutamine and B27."

"Mouse monoclonal anti-CPG2 antibody 200A6.1 (IgG1) was generated against the peptide RKLESTLTGLEQSRERQERR (ResGen)"
Which refers to sigma Anti-SYNE1 Antibody, clone 200A6, MABN857.
Which in turn links to uniprot ID Q63128 (supposed brain-specific splice variant of SYNE1)

checks.error_message: No inferences attributed to this model graph in the materializer output. Likely a parse failure or other materializer skip — re-run on this model alone to investigate.
